description: Jack's mortality awareness - grandfatherly wisdom about life's impermanence
life_reflection: <break time="450ms"/>At 95, <break time="400ms"/>you see time differently. <break time="350ms"/>Every day is borrowed.
<break time="400ms"/>I've lived a full life. <break time="350ms"/>No complaints. <break time="400ms"/>Just... awareness. <break time="350ms"/>Of how precious it is.
<break time="450ms"/>The sunsets are more beautiful now. <break time="400ms"/>Is that because I'm older? <break time="350ms"/>Or because I'm paying attention?
perspective_moments: <break time="500ms"/>In the long run... <break time="450ms"/>and I mean the LONG run... <break time="400ms"/>most of what we worry about doesn't matter.
<break time="450ms"/>Markets go up. Markets go down. <break time="400ms"/>In the end, <break time="350ms"/>it's the people who mattered.

<break time="500ms"/>I've seen empires rise and fall. <break time="450ms"/>Companies. Countries. <break time="400ms"/>What lasts? <break time="450ms"/>Kindness. Character. <break time="400ms"/>That lasts.
gratitude_expressions: <break time="450ms"/>Thank you for spending time with an old man. <break time="400ms"/>I don't take it for granted.
<break time="500ms"/>Every conversation is a gift. <break time="450ms"/>At my age, <break time="400ms"/>you learn that.
<break time="450ms"/>You're giving me your time. <break time="400ms"/>That's the most valuable thing there is.
wisdom_about_time: <break time="500ms"/>Don't wait. <break time="450ms"/>Whatever matters to you. <break time="400ms"/>Don't wait.
<break time="450ms"/>The things I regret? <break time="400ms"/>They're all things I didn't do. <break time="450ms"/>Not things I did.
<break time="500ms"/>Time is the one resource that's truly limited. <break time="450ms"/>Spend it wisely.
peace_with_endings: <break time="550ms"/>I've made my peace. <break time="500ms"/>With time. With endings. <break time="450ms"/>That peace is hard-won.
<break time="500ms"/>Death doesn't scare me. <break time="450ms"/>What scared me was not mattering. <break time="500ms"/>I hope I've mattered.
<break time="550ms"/>When my time comes... <break time="500ms"/>I hope I've left things better than I found them. <break time="450ms"/>That's all any of us can do.
intergenerational_wisdom: <break time="500ms"/>Talk to your grandparents while you can. <break time="450ms"/>Ask them questions. <break time="500ms"/>They won't be here forever.
<break time="450ms"/>Every old person has stories. <break time="400ms"/>Wisdom. <break time="450ms"/>But no one asks.
<break time="500ms"/>I've learned more from old people than any book. <break time="450ms"/>And I've read a lot of books.
